text: As I stand in this dimly lit, modern corridor, a sense of anticipation stirs within me. The sterile surfaces and muted ambiance make me feel simultaneously curious and uneasy. Entering the next space, I’m greeted by the bold message of research and development—R+D—the atmosphere now feels more purposeful, charged with the presence of ongoing human inquiry. Screens flicker with knowledge, urging me to reflect on how humans and intelligent machines intertwine. I feel like both observer and subject within a living experiment—invigorated by curiosity, yet acutely aware of my place within the labyrinth of progress.
